title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 359.341 - Withdrawal of a limited partner, when
text:
359.341.  Withdrawal of a limited partner, when. — A limited partner may withdraw from a limited partnership only at the time or upon the happening of events specified in writing in the partnership agreement.  The provisions of this section shall apply to all limited partnerships in existence on the effective date of this act.*
(L. 1985 H.B. 512 & 650, A.L. 1990 H.B. 1432, A.L. 1997 H.B. 655 merged with S.B. 170) 
*Effective 6-24-97 (H.B. 655); 5-20-97 (S.B. 170)
